dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_focus_The} collapsed this morning, {player_name}. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} trapped. The worst part: we were warned {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_was} building, and someone decided to press ahead anyway.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} tried to stop the recklessness, but {quest_origin} pushed things too far. Now people are in danger. The {enemy_type} have been spotted near the area {location_hint}, drawn by the commotion.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people do not have long. We need someone to clear the area, drive off the {enemy_type}, and get {quest_item} to stabilize things before {quest_time_pressure}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone did something very foolish, {player_name}. {quest_origin} provoked {quest_threat_the}, and now the consequences are raining down on {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} are retaliating with everything they have, and they are heading straight for {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} is organizing a defense, but the response is larger than anything we prepared for.
dialogueChunks.outro: The ones who caused this are nursing their wounds. We need someone capable to get out {location_hint} and reduce {quest_threat_the} before it overwhelms us.

dialogueChunks.intro: Our supply line is gone, {player_name}. {quest_origin} destroyed {quest_focus_the}, and our only reliable route to {quest_item} is severed.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is furious. That route was our lifeline. {quest_ally} says we can establish an alternate path {location_hint}, but it passes through {enemy_type} territory and needs to be secured first.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need materials, we need the path cleared, and we need it done before {quest_threat_the} cuts us off completely. {quest_reward_hint} is yours if you pull this off.
